_comment: Observability capture hooks. These register automatically when the plugin is enabled, but observe.sh is a silent ~1ms no-op unless the project opted in (.agentic/config.json .observability.enabled == true, via /agentic-loop:config observability on, or AGENTIC_OBSERVE=1). No matchers on SubagentStart/Stop by design — docs are contradictory on matcher support there (F2), so agent filtering happens inside observe.sh.
